generations.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    result = ['1'] * n
    
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            if i != j and a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                result[i] = '0'
                break
    
    print(''.join(result))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [j for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            beatable = [j for j in range(n) if j != i and (a[j] < a[i] or b[j] < b[i])]
            max_a_beat = max((a[j] for j in beatable), default=0)
            max_b_beat = max((b[j] for j in beatable), default=0)
            can_win = all(a[d] < max_a_beat or b[d] < max_b_beat for d in dominators)
            res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

import sys

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    result = ['1'] * n
    
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            if i != j and a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                result[i] = '0'
                break
    
    print(''.join(result))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [j for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            beatable = [j for j in range(n) if j != i and (a[j] < a[i] or b[j] < b[i])]
            max_a_beat = max((a[j] for j in beatable), default=0)
            max_b_beat = max((b[j] for j in beatable), default=0)
            can_win = all(a[d] < max_a_beat or b[d] < max_b_beat for d in dominators)
            res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))
